blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,746 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
